case_number: Constitutional Petition is dismissed as not

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1120 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on CMA No.4386/2024 (U/A) 2. For orders on CMA No.4387/2024 (Ex.A) 3. For orders on CMA No.4388/2024 (S/A) 4. For hearing of main case 03.04.2025 Syed Israr Shah, Advocate for the Petitioners >>>>>..<<<<< Counsel for the Petitioners submits that the petitioners intend to file a fresh Petition, therefore, under instructions he does not press instant Constitutional Petition. Accordingly, the instant Constitutional Petition is dismissed as not pressed along with listed applications leaving the petitioners at liberty to file a fresh petition, if they desire so. Judge Judge ARBROHI
